activate_when: The user asks to audit, score, rank, compare, or improve SKILL.md content quality.
The request names a plugin or skill directory and asks for content quality, rubric scoring, or weakest skills.
The task requires per-skill scorecards, plugin averages, or systematic content gap detection.
do_not_activate_when: The user asks for security, factuality, code review, design critique, or grammar-only review without skill-content scoring.
The request is about generic website/article content quality rather than SKILL.md files.
No plugin root, skill directory, or SKILL.md artifact is supplied or inferable.
clarification_required_when: No target directory or SKILL.md file is supplied.
The word quality refers to non-skill content such as marketing copy or code quality.
The user asks for edits instead of a read-only audit.
